prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 10345→8579→11735→9787→53491，2021–2024 年整体在 8500–11700 区间波动，2025 年因山西省首次新高考选科分组，再选化学组（302）位次异常升至 53491，再选不限组（301）位次约 19992，后者更反映学校主流录取水平；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 134 人，2024 年增至 136 人，2025 年增至 142 人；2026 年计划 140 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 2 人（-1.4%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名（华北电力大学整体）2026 年约第 84 名，近年排名稳定在第 75–84 名区间，学校层次稳固；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉舆情文件中均未出现，无显著正面或负面事件；抖音热度未进入前 106 名，关注度一般；无投档断档记录，声誉整体平稳中性；电气工程（A）、动力工程及工程热物理（A-），均为电力行业核心学科；电气工程及其自动化专业为 该校王牌，社会认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业 2024 年被评为「高热推荐」，2023 年「推荐」（66.47），持续升温；能源动力类专业 2024 年「推荐」（66.43）；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业热度亦较高。山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，竞争略有缓和；华北电力大学（保定）位于河北省保定市，与山西省相邻，地域偏好较强；该校在山西省招生占比约 4.7%（2025 年），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年首次新高考选科分组导致位次异常、2026 年计划小幅缩招 1.4%、物理类考生减少 3.4%、电气王牌专业热度持续升温等因素，在 2025 年基准 53491 名基础上，预计竞争略有加剧、位次数字有所回落（更易进）；预测最低位次约 47735 名，区间 47235–48235 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 10345→8579→11735→9787→53491. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated within the 8500–11700 range. In 2025, due to the first new college entrance examination subject grouping in Shanxi Province, the ranking for the chemistry re-selection group (302) abnormally rose to 53491, while the no re-selection group (301) had a ranking of about 19992, with the latter better reflecting the school's mainstream admission level. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 134 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 136 in 2024, and further increased to 142 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 140, a slight reduction of 2 (-1.4%) compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking (overall for North China Electric Power University) is approximately 84th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 75–84 range, indicating a solid school level. The school did not appear in reputation and public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative events. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106, indicating average attention. No record of filing gaps, with overall reputation stable and neutral. Electrical Engineering (A), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), both core disciplines in the power industry. Electrical Engineering and Its Automation is the school's flagship major with high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Its Automation major was rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024 and 'recommended' (66.47) in 2023, with continuous heating up. The Energy and Power Engineering major was 'recommended' (66.43) in 2024. Computer, Electronic Information/Communication and other engineering majors also have high popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, leading to slightly eased competition. North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, adjacent to Shanxi Province, with strong regional preference. The school's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 4.7% (2025), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the abnormal ranking due to the first new college entrance examination subject grouping in 2025, a slight enrollment reduction of 1.4% in 2026, a 3.4% decrease in physics category examinees, and the continuous heating up of the flagship electrical major, based on the 2025 benchmark of 53491, competition is expected to slightly intensify and the ranking number to decrease (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 47735, with a range of 47235–48235.

- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Information Management and Information Systems
- Engineering Cost.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 47235–48235, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Its Automation), and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<47235), focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Electrical and Electronic Information. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>48235), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 3 safety majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准 2792 名、2026 年计划持平、历史类考生大幅减少 25.6% 等因素，竞争明显减弱，预计位次数字后移（更容易进）；预测最低位次约 2842 名，区间 2342–3342 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2132→2157→2814→2509→2792, fluctuating within the 2100–2800 range overall, with a 2025 baseline of about 2792; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 14 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking approximately 84th, stable level; the school did not appear in reputation sentiment files, no significant events; Douyin attention is average; reputation is stable and neutral; Electrical Engineering (A), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are engineering disciplines, not directly related to liberal arts majors, but the school's overall strong engineering background has limited impact on liberal arts applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The school's liberal arts enrollment majors include Law, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, Public Administration, etc. Law is socially popular (recommended), Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, Shanxi Province has approximately 63,113 history category examinees, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, indicating notably eased competition; the school is located in Baoding, Hebei, adjacent to Shanxi, with strong regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline of 2792, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and a 25.6% reduction in history category examinees, competition is significantly weakened, and the ranking number is expected to shift backward (easier to enter); predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2842, with a range of 2342–3342.
